name: numbersense-practice
description: A 10-day number sense practice app for Cloudflare Workers and Pages.

scripts.deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.cloudflare:preview: npm run build && npx wrangler dev
scripts.cloudflare:deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler deploy
scripts.cloudflare:pages:deploy: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy public --project-name numbersense-practice
